expectedAnswers: I'm from Xi'an — the history and dumplings are unbeatable!
I grew up in Kunming. The weather is perfect all year round.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回答了原籍地，未混淆现居地
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了'from'或'grew up in'等正确结构
表达自然度：使用了感叹词或情感词（如unbeatable, perfect）增强真诚感
关键词覆盖：包含地点+至少一个情感/特征描述

content.speakerText: What do you do to unwind after work?
content.speakerTextCn: 下班后你一般怎么放松？
expectedAnswers: I go for walks in the park — it’s my little escape.
I cook Chinese dishes — not professional, but it calms me down.
I listen to music, especially folk songs from my hometown.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确描述了放松活动，回应了‘unwind’的核心意图
语言准确性：使用了恰当动词（go for walks, cook, listen）和连接结构
表达自然度：使用了'not professional but...'或情感词（escape, calms me down）降低压力感
关键词覆盖：包含活动+情感/效果，符合口语真实表达

content.speakerText: What’s one thing you miss most about your hometown?
content.speakerTextCn: 你最想念家乡的哪一件事？
expectedAnswers: The morning dim sum at the corner shop — nothing compares!
The way the rain sounds on the old rooftops — it’s so soothing.
The annual lantern festival. I haven’t found anything like it here.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确回应了‘miss’的情感需求，表达怀旧
语言准确性：使用了恰当的比较结构（nothing compares, like it here）
表达自然度：使用了感官描述（sounds, soothing）和感叹语气增强感染力
关键词覆盖：包含具体事物+情感反应，体现文化细节
